before_phase.description: Assemble a phase-specific context pack before every major workflow phase.

after_phase.description: Persist summary state and observability snapshots after phase transitions.

before_commit.description: Require aggregate verdict approval before commit gating.

on_blocked.description: Record the blocker and direct the user to rf-resume or the missing approval.

on_failed.description: Persist failure attribution and surface the next repair or escalation step.
